reviews.review_msg: Idiot. Takes him 7 weeks to return assignments, when he does return something. Spends tutorial watching you tube. Useless, stay away
he is extremely helpful and clear about the instruction of teaching me how to do essay!! he is my best teacher ever!!!

Wow. Someone didn't get the marks they wanted! The Myth and Communication course with Roman was the most interesting one i took in that department, and Steve's tutorials ruled. Really, the best tutorials i have had. In a sea of self-important professors at SFU, i would say he was the least self-important. Like the opposite of self important.
Ladies, don't go to his office hour alone, is all I'm saying. Entirely useless, self-important, and lusty man. Disgusting!
He is brilliant. Very attractive also. But very helpful..
He was a great teacher, learn lots, but he was soooo good looking it was hard to concentrate. But great prof, really into his material. He made sure his students learn.
He was a great teacher, learn lots, but he was soooo good looking it was hard to concentrate. But great prof, really into his material.

oh, i wrote the review below and i meant cmns223, not cmns372 ... anyway, i highly recommend that you take a course with kammerer, whether as a TA or instructor, though there were some problems with this course and with the lectures.

For a 2nd year course on ads this was pretty heavy on theory for the first half. If you can make it through the Marx and Adorno you are good to go for the second half. This was the instructor's first time lecturing and it showed at times -- i've had him as a TA for courses that rocked, like the myth course, and he was one of the best TAs ever.

steve's a nice guy, & is really into the material. He's a pretty demanding marker, but gives a lot of detailed direction and pointers on how to write a paper. He was way more prepared in the tutorial i took than the other reviews here, though he isn't very consistent w/ office hours.
